Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Checklist Completed occurring immediately after Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Percentage of process variants where SW-Checklist Completed appears before SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Number of times SW-Checklist Completed is followed by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Number of 'SW-Checklist Completed' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed that occur without a prior SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days reminder
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all cases where 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' does not happen

Name: Ratio of SW-Checklist Completed to SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Frequency of SW-Checklist Completed in variants that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed occurrences that are part of the most frequent variant pattern
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all cases

Name: Number of SW-Checklist Completed events that directly enable transition to reviewer assignment phase (e.g., followed by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection or SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Checklist Completed' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Checklist Completed occurs only once versus multiple times
Metric: the average of the function base == 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Checklist Completed appearing after Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed that precede any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Ratio of SW-Checklist Completed to Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Number of variants in which SW-Checklist Completed is immediately followed by a deadline reminder (e.g., SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days or SW-Checklist Completion now due)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Checklist Completed' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed events that occur within 24 hours of Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
